source.name: Web-verified Liquid Glass CSS parameter ranges
source.license_notes: Parameter ranges distilled from MDN CSS docs, Microsoft Fluent/Acrylic guidance, and common glassmorphism implementation examples; store summarized guidance and source links.

layout_rules: Use backdrop-filter only on transparent or partially transparent surfaces; otherwise the blur will not be visible.
Avoid stacking many glass layers edge-to-edge because seams and optical noise become visible.
Reserve strong glass for transient surfaces, hero controls, cards, menus, modals, and selected states rather than dense repeated rows.
Provide fallback solid/translucent colors for unsupported browsers, reduced transparency, battery saver, low-end hardware, and high contrast modes.
accessibility_notes: Text on glass must meet contrast requirements; avoid accent-colored body text over acrylic/glass surfaces.
Use icons or text in addition to color glow for error, success, and selected states.
Support reduced transparency and high contrast fallbacks.
implementation_hints: Light glass fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.18) to rgba(255,255,255,0.42); for thicker white glass use 0.45 to 0.68.
Dark glass fill: rgba(8,10,16,0.56) to rgba(8,10,16,0.78); keep text white or near-white.
Backdrop filter baseline: blur(12px) saturate(140%) for subtle glass; blur(18px) saturate(160%) for strong frosted glass; blur(24px) saturate(180%) for hero liquid glass.
Border/rim: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35) to rgba(255,255,255,0.68); add a lower dark inset edge rgba(20,30,50,0.10) to 0.22 for thickness.
Radius: 18px to 28px for fields/cards; 999px for pill buttons; 32px to 44px for large modal cards.
Outer shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(31,38,135,0.12) for light components; 0 18px 48px rgba(20,30,60,0.22) for thick floating glass.
Inner highlight: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.70), inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(20,30,60,0.12).
Gloss pseudo-element: top-left white radial/linear gradient at 0.35 to 0.65 opacity, clipped inside the radius.
Chromatic caustics: small radial gradients in cyan/magenta/orange at 0.18 to 0.36 opacity near edges or corners; do not cover text areas.
Performance: avoid applying backdrop-filter to hundreds of cells/rows; use it on containers and key controls only.

quality.notes: Web-verified parameter ranges. MDN defines backdrop-filter syntax and transparency requirement; Microsoft Fluent/Acrylic docs guide appropriate use, fallbacks, and legibility constraints. Numeric ranges are practical CSS implementation ranges synthesized for the user's Liquid Glass references.

retrieval.ai_summary: Liquid Glass CSS parameter ranges: use transparent fills, backdrop-filter blur(12-24px) saturate(140-180%), 1px white rim, large radii, layered outer/inset shadows, gloss pseudo-elements, chromatic caustics, and accessibility/performance fallbacks.
